channel.title: bitcoin-development on ₿itcoin Transcripts
channel.description: Recent content in bitcoin-development on ₿itcoin Transcripts

item.title: Aaron and Sjors discuss what's new in Bitcoin Core v30
item.description: Intro Sjors: 00:00:00 Hello, how are you? Aaron: 00:00:23 It’s been a while. Sjors: 00:00:24 It’s been a few days. Aaron: 00:00:26 Yeah, we haven’t made an episode because we always committed to only making episodes live in person. There were some exceptions, but I think neither of us really liked that, so we kind of made it the rule. But I haven’t been in the Netherlands for a while now, never mind in Utrecht, so we couldn’t do it.

item.title: Bitcoin Core 26.0: What's New, Plus F2Pool's OFAC Transaction Filtering
item.description: In this episode of Bitcoin, Explained, Aaron and Sjors explain what new features are included in the upcoming Bitcoin Core 0.26 release. They also briefly discuss recent developments concerning the transaction inclusion policy of mining pool F2Pool, which appears to have been compliant with the OFAC sanctions list.
